nasb.text: But Saul, who was also known as Paul, filled with the Holy Spirit, fixed his gaze on him,

esv.text: But Saul, who was also called Paul, filled with the Holy Spirit, looked intently at him

cnv.text: 掃羅，也就是保羅，卻被聖靈充滿，定睛看著他，

ccb.text: 又名扫罗的保罗被圣灵充满，盯着他说：

csbs.text: 可是扫罗，也就是保罗，被圣灵充满，注视着以路摩，
